AI-first 裁决\n@@ -221,2 +248,12 @@\n \n+### 3.7 默认输出必须从 Godot rich print 迁出\n+\n+hard cutover 后：\n+\n+- `GD.PrintRich` 不应出现在 AI 默认 Log sink。\n+- `GD.PushWarning` / `GD.PushError` 只由 `GodotEditorSink` 或 fatal bridge 按 profile 调用。\n+- `StdoutSummarySink` 使用 C# `Console.Out` 输出摘要。\n+- `JsonlFileSink` 使用 C# buffered writer 输出完整结构化日志。\n+- runner 读取 JSONL/artifact 为主，stdout summary 只辅助定位。\n+\n ## 4. 裁决摘要\n@@ -233,2 +270,3 @@\n - **runner 先整理 artifact，再给 AI 分析**。\n+- **默认 sink 迁到 C# stdout summary + buffered JSONL file，Godot editor sink 默认关闭**。\n \n@@ -240 +278,2 @@\n - 不建议把测试 `Fail()` 封装成单纯 `GD.PushError`；这仍是文本输出，不是统一 Validation。\n+- 不建议继续把 `GD.PrintRich` 当成默认 Log 输出；颜色显示是人工调试需求，不是 AI-first 主链路。\n",

### 000514 custom_tool_call `apply_patch`

```json
{
  "type": "custom_tool_call",
  "status": "completed",
  "call_id": "call_cv7yNZFbeLyzGRbX4ARpnTq3",
  "name": "apply_patch",
  "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: DocsAI/ECS/Tools/Logger/README.md\n@@\n-> 更新：2026-06-08\n+> 更新：2026-06-09\n@@\n - 使用 `GD.PrintRich` 输出 BBCode 文本。\n - `Warn` / `Error` 会同步 `GD.PushWarning` / `GD.PushError`。\n - 默认墙钟时间显示，不提供 `runElapsedMs / frame / physicsFrame`。\n \n 这只是当前实现，不是后续推荐架构。\n+\n+## Sink 裁决\n+\n+AI-first 目标不再默认使用 Godot API 打印：\n+\n+- 默认详细事实写入 C# buffered JSONL file。\n+- 默认可见输出使用 C# stdout summary。\n+- Validation 使用 memory / artifact sink。\n+- `GD.PrintRich` / `GD.PushWarning` / `GD.PushError` 只作为可选 `GodotEditorSink`，默认关闭。\n+\n+原因：Godot rich print 的价值是 editor Output 面板和 BBCode 颜色；AI 分析需要结构化 JSONL、artifact 和稳定 stdout 摘要。\n@@\n - `OperationTrace` / flow summary 聚合长过程。\n - `Config/Log` profile + CLI override。\n+- C# stdout summary + buffered JSONL file 作为默认 sink。\n - Validation artifact 作为测试主事实源。\n - runner analyzer 先拆分日志目录，再给 AI 分析。\n*** End Patch\n"
}
```

### 000526 custom_tool_call `apply_patch`

```json
{
  "type": "custom_tool_call",
  "status": "completed",
  "call_id": "call_Sc68vQXE9fYmbQyGatT1APn6",
  "name": "apply_patch",
  "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/Core/progress.md\n@@\n-- **Updated**: 2026-06-08\n+- **Updated**: 2026-06-09\n - **Current SDD**: none\n-- **Last Conclusion**: 已按用户 2026-06-08 Log 工具 DeepThink 要求完成 `design/Tool/10.Log/` 设计包升级：Log 被重新定义为 AI-first Observation 入口，范围包含结构化 envelope、severity/outcome/validationStatus、run elapsed/frame/phase、`OperationTrace` flow 聚合、`Config/Log` profile + CLI override、Validation artifact、runner analyzer 分目录、owner `Log.md` 模板和固定 AI 分析流程。当前只改设计文档，不改源码/runner。\n+- **Last Conclusion**: 已按用户 2026-06-09 反馈补充 Log sink 裁决：AI-first 默认输出不走 `GD.PrintRich` / Godot Output 面板，而是 C# buffered JSONL file 作为详细事实源、C# stdout summary 作为 runner 摘要、memory/artifact 作为 Validation 事实源；Godot editor sink 只作为人工调试可选项，默认关闭。当前只改设计文档，不改源码/runner。\n@@\n-| TBD | proposed | `design/Tool/10.Log/` | Log AI-first Observation hard cutover：结构化日志、flow 聚合、profile/CLI、Validation artifact、runner analyzer、owner Log 文档和固定 AI 分析流程；等待用户确认后创建执行型 SDD |\n+| TBD | proposed | `design/Tool/10.Log/` | Log AI-first Observation hard cutover：结构化日志、flow 聚合、C# stdout summary + buffered JSONL file、Godot editor sink optional、profile/CLI、Validation artifact、runner analyzer、owner Log 文档和固定 AI 分析流程；等待用户确认后创建执行型 SDD |\n@@\n ### P051 — 2026-06-08 — log-ai-first-observation-deepthink\n@@\n - **Resume**: PRJ-0002 当前无 active 子 SDD；若用户确认执行，创建 `Log AI-first Observation Hard Cutover`，从 `design/Tool/10.Log/README.md -> 01 -> 02 -> 03 -> 04 -> 05 -> 06` 进入。\n+\n+### P052 — 2026-06-09 — log-sink-csharp-stdout-jsonl-decision\n+\n+- **Context**: 用户指出当前日志通过 Godot API 打印是为了 Godot editor 颜色显示；现在目标是 AI 分析，不需要颜色，应重新思考是否使用 C# stdout/file 输出。\n+- **Conclusion**: 已补充 sink 裁决：AI-first 默认 sink 应从 Godot rich print 迁出。详细结构化事实默认写 C# buffered JSONL file；runner 可见摘要默认写 C# stdout summary；Validation 使用 memory/artifact sink；`GD.PrintRich` / `GD.PushWarning` / `GD.PushError` 只由可选 `GodotEditorSink` 调用，profile 默认关闭。不能简单把所有日志改成每条 `Console.WriteLine`，因为 stdout IO 仍可能成为瓶颈；高密度数据必须 buffered file + 摘要输出。\n+- **Evidence**: `design/Tool/10.Log/README.md`、`01-现状分析与AI-first裁决.md`、`02-目标架构与数据契约.md`、`03-控制面与CLI设计.md`、`design/INDEX.md`、`DocsAI/ECS/Tools/Logger/README.md` 和本 `Core/progress.md` 已同步。\n+- **Research Adoption**: externalResources enabled=`official-docs`，scope=Context7 `/dotnet/docs` Console/stdout/custom console logger/high-performance logging、Context7 `/godotengine/godot-docs` `print_rich` / output panel / standard output；copiedCodeOrAssets=none；adoption=采纳 C# stdout/file sink、`IsEnabled` 后输出、Godot rich print 是 editor/human display 的边界，不复制 `ILogger` 或外部 logging provider。\n+- **Impact**: 后续实现不应把 `GD.PrintRich` 当默认 sink，也不应把所有详细日志刷到 stdout。默认 profile 应启用 `jsonl-buffered-file`、`stdout-summary`、`memory`、`artifact`，关闭 `godot-editor`。\n+- **Resume**: 若创建 Log hard cutover SDD，第一阶段 Logger core 设计必须先实现 sink abstraction，并把 `GodotEditorSink` 做成可选 sink，而不是在 `LogInternal` 里直接调用 Godot API。\n*** End Patch\n"
}
```

### 000532 custom_tool_call `apply_patch`

```json
{
  "type": "custom_tool_call",
  "status": "completed",
  "call_id": "call_SLrbNwjH5D9r27w6pICEBrhe",
  "name": "apply_patch",
  "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/Core/notes.md\n@@\n - Context7 `/godotengine/godot-docs`：`GD.PushError` / `GD.PushWarning` 输出到 Godot debugger 和 OS terminal；用于校准它们是错误/警告 sink，不是测试断言主事实源。\n - Context7 `/godotengine/godot-docs`：`Engine.GetProcessFrames()` / `Engine.GetPhysicsFrames()` 和 `Time.GetTicksMsec()` / `Time.GetTicksUsec()` 可提供 process frame、physics frame 和 engine elapsed time；用于校准 Log 默认用 `runElapsedMs/frame/physicsFrame`，墙钟只作可选跨 artifact 对齐。\n+- Context7 `/godotengine/godot-docs`：`print_rich` / `GD.PrintRich` 支持 BBCode rich text，会显示到 editor Output 和标准输出；用于校准 Godot rich print 是人工/editor 显示 sink，不应作为 AI-first 默认高密度日志路径。\n+- Context7 `/dotnet/docs`：`Console.WriteLine` 写标准输出，.NET custom console logger 示例先 `IsEnabled` 再输出；高性能 logging 建议 `LoggerMessage` / source-generated logging；用于校准 C# stdout summary 和 buffered file sink 方向，不代表每条详细日志都刷 stdout。\n@@\n - Log hard cutover 执行前需确认是否一个 SDD 同批改 Logger、Validation helper 和 runner analyzer；默认同批，否则测试事实源仍分裂。\n - Log profile 默认建议放 `Config/Log/`，但执行前可再确认是否改为 `Data/Log/` 或游戏仓本地配置。\n - `Success` 建议从 severity 中删除，改为 `outcome=Succeeded` 或 `validationStatus=pass`；执行前若用户不同意，需要更新 `design/Tool/10.Log/README.md` 和 `02-目标架构与数据契约.md`。\n+- Log sink 已由 2026-06-09 裁决更新：默认 `jsonl-buffered-file` + `stdout-summary` + `memory/artifact`，`godot-editor` 默认关闭；执行时不要把 `Console.WriteLine` 当详细日志主路径，详细日志应 buffered 写 JSONL。\n*** End Patch\n"
}
```

```json
      "move_path": null
    }

}
```

### 000546 custom_tool_call `apply_patch`

```json
{
  "type": "custom_tool_call",
  "status": "completed",
  "call_id": "call_zP6b8o3gZyMjyZJkPgPjEuzV",
  "name": "apply_patch",
  "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/README.md\n@@\n-当前方向已经纠偏：不再把旧 ECS 作为迁移输入，不再以整体替换或复制外部参考结构为目标。旧框架整体可保留；Data 子系统已按 SDD-0012 至 SDD-0022 完成 descriptor-first / snapshot-first / no-compat / residual contract hardening 收口，并按 SDD-0031 / SDD-0032 完成 runtime generic slot hard cutover 和 typed contract completion：typed `DataKey<T>` 主链路、modifier 和 computed cache 现在使用 `DataSlot<T> + IDataSlot`，业务 Capability 和 AI 可调用 Data 协议不再使用 string key / untyped write / object payload 作为主链路。Data 完成后的 GC/装箱优化已按 SDD-0033 完成非 Data 边界收口：Event dynamic object 主链路删除，Feature / Ability Execute 边界改为 typed payload/result helper，ObjectPoolManager 改 `IObjectPoolRuntime` 非泛型管理接口，TargetSelector 新增 `TargetQueryEngine + TargetQueryResult` ownership / diagnostics facade；其中 Logger 热路径 GC 小切片当时保持 profiler 驱动。2026-06-08 已新增 `design/Tool/10.Log/`，把 Log 作为 AI-first Observation 入口重新设计：结构化 envelope、flow 聚合、profile/CLI、Validation artifact、runner analyzer 和 owner `Log.md` 必须同批考虑，后续建议创建 Log hard cutover SDD。Entity / Relationship 已按 SDD-0024 完成 hard cutover。SDD-0025 已把 ECS 物理目录和 DocsAI 路由重构为 `Runtime + Capabilities + Tools + UI`，同时保留 ECS 语义；`design/Tool/其他Tool/` 已按 2026-06-04 至 2026-06-07 用户复核更新为功能优先 hard cutover：RuntimeMountRegistry、TargetQueryEngine、ResourceLoading、NodeLifecycleRegistry、Common Utilities、MathFormula 后续只保功能，不保旧 API 长期兼容；已确认 `/root/SlimeAIRuntime`、资源 strict fail-fast、Common Utilities 放 `Src/ECS/Tools/CommonUtilities/`、NodeLifecycle 迁 Runtime、TargetSelector 不做兼容桥。SDD-0035 至 SDD-0038 已完成剩余 Tools hard cutover：Runtime mount + NodeLifecycle、TargetQueryEngine、ResourceLoading + CommonUtilities、Math formula + deterministic RNG 均已完成并同步 DocsAI/skill。SDD-0026 已完成 Input Contract 业务语义 facade、调用点迁移和验证闭环。SDD-0027 Timer 重构已完成可执行代码/文档主链路但被当前 BrotatoLike runner/Godot CLI 缺失阻塞在场景验证。SDD-0028 已完成 ObjectPool / Collision ParkedInTree cutover。SDD-0029 已完成 Runtime System manifest / preflight / diagnostics / trace 收口。SDD-0030 已完成 Component 默认组合从 `.tscn` Preset 到 C# profile / composer 的切换，并补齐 Component manifest、DocsAI 和 owner skill 规则。\n+当前方向已经纠偏：不再把旧 ECS DocsAI/ECS/Tools/Logger/Concept.md:10:当前 legacy 日志系统，封装 Godot 的 `GD.PrintRich` 支持 BBCode 颜色，6 个严重级别（Trace → Error），Release 条件编译排除。
```
```text
DocsAI/ECS/Tools/Logger/Concepts/logger.md:9:### 1.1 为什么包装 `GD.PrintRich` 而不是使用标准 C# Console？
DocsAI/ECS/Tools/Logger/Concepts/logger.md:13:- **Godot 的 `GD.PrintRich`**：支持 **BBCode** 颜色标签。这意味着我们可以让 `ERROR` 显示为红色，`SUCCESS` 显示为绿色，`DEBUG` 显示为青色。这种视觉区分能极大地提高阅读日志的效率。
DocsAI/ECS/Tools/Logger/Concepts/logger.md:14:- **标准 C# `Console.WriteLine`**：在 Godot 编辑器中显示为单色纯文本，无法快速区分重要信息。
DocsAI/ECS/Tools/Logger/README.md:17:- 使用 `GD.PrintRich` 输出 BBCode 文本。
DocsAI/ECS/Tools/Logger/README.md:27:- 默认详细事实写入 C# buffered JSONL file。

DocsAI/ECS/Tools/Logger/README.md:49:- C# stdout summary + buffered JSONL file 作为默认 sink。

SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/Tool/10.Log/03-控制面与CLI设计.md:193:`GD.PrintRich` / `GD.PushError` 不再是默认打印实现。它们只能由 `GodotEditorSink` 调用，并且必须在 profile 和 run metadata 中留下痕迹。这样 AI 下次恢复时能知道当时是否启用了 Godot editor 输出。

SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/Tool/10.Log/02-目标架构与数据契约.md:304:- profile 显式启用时才调用 `GD.PrintRich` / `GD.PushWarning` / `GD.PushError`。
SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/Tool/10.Log/02-目标架构与数据契约.md:345:- 不允许 AI-first 默认路径依赖 `GD.PrintRich` 的颜色、BBCode 或 Godot Output 面板。
SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/Tool/10.Log/README.md:53:- 不把 `GD.PrintRich` / Godot Output 面板作为 AI-first 默认输出路径；它只适合人工编辑器调试，不适合作为高密度机器日志主链路。
SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/Tool/10.Log/README.md:62:| `StdoutSummarySink` | 开 | runner 摘要和人类快速看结果 | 使用 C# `Console.Out` / `Console.WriteLine`，只输出 flow summary、validation verdict、关键 warn/error。 |
SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/Tool/10.Log/README.md:65:| `GodotEditorSink` | 默认关 | 编辑器人工调试 | 只在 profile 显式启用时调用 `GD.PrintRich` / `GD.PushWarning` / `GD.PushError`。 |
SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/Tool/10.Log/README.md:70:- `GD.PrintRich` 会做 Godot API 调用、Godot Variant/String 路径和 BBCode / rich text 处理；这些对 AI JSONL 没有价值。
SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/Tool/10.Log/README.md:72:- 但不能把“C# 打印”误解成“每条日志都 `Console.WriteLine`”。高密度日志默认应 buffered 写 JSONL，stdout 只打摘要，否则 stdout IO 仍会成为瓶颈。
SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/Tool/10.Log/README.md:74:结论：**AI-first 默认链路是 C# buffered JSONL + stdout summary；Godot API sink 只是可选人工调试桥。**
SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/Tool/10.Log/README.md:244:- `Src/ECS/Tools/Logger/Log.cs` 当前仍是 `GD.PrintRich` 字符串拼接、墙钟时间、全局等级 + context level。
SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/Core/progress.md:11:- **Last Conclusion**: 已按用户 2026-06-09 反馈补充 Log sink 裁决：AI-first 默认输出不走 `GD.PrintRich` / Godot Output 面板，而是 C# buffered JSONL file 作为详细事实源、C# stdout summary 作为 runner 摘要、memory/artifact 作为 Validation 事实源；Godot editor sink 只作为人工调试可选项，默认关闭。当前只改设计文档，不改源码/runner。
SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/Core/progress.md:39:| TBD | proposed | `design/Tool/10.Log/` | Log AI-first Observation hard cutover：结构化日志、flow 聚合、C# stdout summary + buffered JSONL file、Godot editor sink optional、profile/CLI、Validation artifact、runner analyzer、owner Log 文档和固定 AI 分析流程；等待用户确认后创建执行型 SDD |
SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/Core/progress.md:452:- **Conclusion**: 已补充 sink 裁决：AI-first 默认 sink 应从 Godot rich print 迁出。详细结构化事实默认写 C# buffered JSONL file；runner 可见摘要默认写 C# stdout summary；Validation 使用 memory/artifact sink；`GD.PrintRich` / `GD.PushWarning` / `GD.PushError` 只由可选 `GodotEditorSink` 调用，profile 默认关闭。不能简单把所有日志改成每条 `Console.WriteLine`，因为 stdout IO 仍可能成为瓶颈；高密度数据必须 buffered file + 摘要输出。
SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/Core/progress.md:455:- **Impact**: 后续实现不应把 `GD.PrintRich` 当默认 sink，也不应把所有详细日志刷到 stdout。默认 profile 应启用 `jsonl-buffered-file`、`stdout-summary`、`memory`、`artifact`，关闭 `godot-editor`。
SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/Core/progress.md:456:- **Resume**: 若创建 Log hard cutover SDD，第一阶段 Logger core 设计必须先实现 sink abstraction，并把 `GodotEditorSink` 做成可选 sink，而不是在 `LogInternal` 里直接调用 Godot API。
SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/Core/notes.md:23:- Context7 `/godotengine/godot-docs`：`print_rich` / `GD.PrintRich` 支持 BBCode rich text，会显示到 editor Output 和标准输出；用于校准 Godot rich print 是人工/editor 显示 sink，不应作为 AI-first 默认高密度日志路径。
SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/Core/notes.md:24:- Context7 `/dotnet/docs`：`Console.WriteLine` 写标准输出，.NET custom console logger 示例先 `IsEnabled` 再输出；高性能 logging 建议 `LoggerMessage` / source-generated logging；用于校准 C# stdout summary 和 buffered file sink 方向，不代表每条详细日志都刷 stdout。
SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/Core/notes.md:50:- Log sink 已由 2026-06-09 裁决更新：默认 `jsonl-buffered-file` + `stdout-summary` + `memory/artifact`，`godot-editor` 默认关闭；执行时不要把 `Console.WriteLine` 当详细日志主路径，详细日志应 buffered 写 JSONL。

SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/Core/roadmap.md:63:| P0 | `design/Tool/10.Log/README.md` | 建议创建 **Log AI-first Observation Hard Cutover**：结构化 `LogEntry`、severity/outcome、`OperationTrace`、C# stdout summary + buffered JSONL file、optional Godot editor sink、`Config/Log` profile、`logctl`、ValidationSession、runner analyzer、owner `Log.md` 和降噪回写同批设计/实施；不建议只做 Logger 热路径小修，也不建议把详细日志简单改成每条 `Console.WriteLine` |
SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/Tool/10.Log/01-现状分析与AI-first裁决.md:14:- 输出主体仍是 `GD.PrintRich` 的字符串拼接。

SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/Tool/10.Log/01-现状分析与AI-first裁决.md:155:默认详细日志 -> C# buffered JSONL file
```

````text
# Logger 设计文档 (高级 C# 版)

**核心理念**：专业级游戏开发日志系统。支持实例初始化、分级过滤、按类过滤、格式配置，最大化开发效率。

---

## 1. 为什么选择此方案？

### 1.1 为什么包装 `GD.PrintRich` 而不是使用标准 C# Console？

在 Godot 开发环境中，编辑器的 **Output (输出)** 面板是开发者最常查看的窗口。

- **Godot 的 `GD.PrintRich`**：支持 **BBCode** 颜色标签。这意味着我们可以让 `ERROR` 显示为红色，`SUCCESS` 显示为绿色，`DEBUG` 显示为青色。这种视觉区分能极大地提高阅读日志的效率。
- **标准 C# `Console.WriteLine`**：在 Godot 编辑器中显示为单色纯文本，无法快速区分重要信息。

### 1.2 为什么需要实例和过滤？

在大型项目中，日志噪音是效率杀手。

- **实例初始化**：通过在类中定义 `static Log` 实例，可以自动为该类所有日志标记上下文名称。
- **全局控制**：通过 `Log.GlobalLevel` 一键屏蔽低优先级日志。
- **上下文过滤**：你正在调试 `Player.cs`，不希望被 `EnemyAI.cs` 的海量日志刷屏。通过 `Log.SetLevel("EnemyAI", LogLevel.Warning)` 即可静音敌人模块。

---

## 2. API 与配置

### 2.1 日志等级 (LogLevel)

| 等级        | 值  | 说明                         |
| :---------- | :-- | :--------------------------- |
| **Trace**   | 0   | 最细粒度的运行时流转信息     |
| **Debug**   | 1   | 关键变量或逻辑点调试         |
| **Info**    | 2   | 普通运行信息                 |
| **Success** | 3   | 关键流程成功完成             |
| **Warning** | 4   | 警告 (调用 `GD.PushWarning`) |
| **Error**   | 5   | 错误 (调用 `GD.PushError`)   |
| **None**    | 99  | 关闭日志                     |

### 2.2 全局配置选项

所有配置均为静态属性，可在游戏启动时（如 `Main.cs` 或 `GameManager.cs`）进行设置。

```csharp
// 全局日志等级：只显示 Info 及以上
Log.GlobalLevel = LogLevel.Info;

// 格式控制
Log.ShowTimestamp = true;  // 显示时间戳
Log.ShowContext = true;    // 显示 [类名]

// **核心功能：上下文过滤**
// 屏蔽 Player 类的所有 Trace/Debug 日志，只看 Info 及以上
Log.SetLevel("Player", LogLevel.Info);
// 彻底屏蔽 Enemy 类的所有日志
Log.SetLevel("Enemy", LogLevel.None);
```

---

## 3. 使用示例

### 3.1 基础用法 (推荐)

在每个类中定义一个静态的 `Log` 实例。

```csharp
using BrotatoMy;

public partial class Weapon : Node2D
{
    // 1. 初始化 Log 实例，传入类名
    private static readonly Log Log = new Log("Weapon");

    public override void _Ready()
    {
        // 2. 追踪日志 (仅在 Debug 模式生效，发布版自动剔除)
        Log.Trace("Weapon _Ready called");

        // 3. 调试日志 (仅在 Debug 模式生效，发布版自动剔除)
        Log.Debug($"Loading weapon stats");

        if (LoadStats())
        {
            // 4. 成功日志
            Log.Success("Weapon loaded successfully");
        }
        else
        {
            // 5. 错误日志
            Log.Error("Failed to load weapon stats!");
        }
    }
}
```

### 3.2 进阶用法：特定实例等级

你可以为某个特定类的日志设置独立的等级，而不受全局等级限制。

```csharp
// 该类的日志即使全局是 Info，也会显示 Trace
private static readonly Log Log = new Log("CriticalSystem", LogLevel.Trace);
```

---

## 4. 最佳实践

1.  **开发阶段**：将 `GlobalLevel` 设为 `Debug` 或 `Trace`。
2.  **发布阶段**：无需修改代码，`Trace` 和 `Debug` 调用会被编译器自动移除。建议将 `GlobalLevel` 设为 `Info` 或 `Warning` 以防万一。
3.  **调试特定 Bug**：
    - 在初始化代码中设置 `Log.SetLevel("BuggyScript", LogLevel.Trace);`
    - 设置 `Log.GlobalLevel = LogLevel.Warning;` (屏蔽其他所有脚本的噪音)
    - 这样控制台里就只有那个出 Bug 脚本的详细日志了。

---

## 5. 性能与优化

### 5.1 Release 模式零损耗

利用 C# 的 `[Conditional("DEBUG")]` 特性，所有的 `Log.Trace` 和 `Log.Debug` 调用在发布版本（Release）中会被编译器**彻底移除**。

- **意味着**：即使你在 `_Process` 里每帧写 100 行 `Log.Debug`，发布后的游戏性能损耗也是 **0**。

### 5.2 过滤保护

在进行任何字符串拼接（如时间戳、BBCode）之前，系统会先检查日志等级。如果等级被过滤，方法会立即返回，**不产生任何不必要的性能开销**。

---

## 6. 文件结构

```
scenes/Tools/
└── Logger/
    └── Log.cs             # 核心逻辑
```

````

### 000571 custom_tool_call `apply_patch`

```json
{
  "type": "custom_tool_call",
  "status": "completed",
  "call_id": "call_GC6HzyavZhAVDm8SZZe9wxcF",
  "name": "apply_patch",
  "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: DocsAI/ECS/Tools/Logger/Concepts/logger.md\n@@\n-# Logger 设计文档 (高级 C# 版)\n+# Logger 设计文档 (legacy 高级 C# 版)\n \n-**核心理念**：专业级游戏开发日志系统。支持实例初始化、分级过滤、按类过滤、格式配置，最大化开发效率。\n+> status: legacy-reference\n+> currentEntry: `DocsAI/ECS/Tools/Logger/README.md`\n+> currentDesign: `SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/Tool/10.Log/README.md`\n+> lastReviewed: 2026-06-09\n+\n+**历史核心理念**：专业级游戏开发日志系统。支持实例初始化、分级过滤、按类过滤、格式配置，最大化开发效率。\n+\n+本文保留旧人工调试方案，不再作为 AI-first Log 目标架构。当前裁决是：AI-first 默认使用 C# stdout summary + buffered JSONL file；`GD.PrintRich` / `GD.PushWarning` / `GD.PushError` 只作为可选 `GodotEditorSink`。\n@@\n-### 1.1 为什么包装 `GD.PrintRich` 而不是使用标准 C# Console？\n+### 1.1 历史方案为什么包装 `GD.PrintRich`？\n@@\n-- **标准 C# `Console.WriteLine`**：在 Godot 编辑器中显示为单色纯文本，无法快速区分重要信息。\n+- **标准 C# `Console.WriteLine`**：在 Godot 编辑器中显示为单色纯文本，无法快速区分重要信息。\n+\n+这个判断只适用于“人类在 Godot editor 里看彩色日志”的场景。AI-first 场景需要结构化 JSONL、artifact 和稳定 stdout 摘要，不需要 BBCode 颜色。因此后续实现不应继续把 `GD.PrintRich` 当默认输出。\n+\n+当前 sink 裁决：\n+\n+| Sink | 默认 | 说明 |\n+| --- | --- | --- |\n+| `jsonl-buffered-file` | 开 | AI 详细事实源。 |\n+| `stdout-summary` | 开 | runner 摘要和关键错误。 |\n+| `memory/artifact` | 开 | Validation 和 scene gate。 |\n+| `godot-editor` | 关 | 人工 editor debug，可选调用 Godot API。 |\n@@\n ## 4. 最佳实践\n+\n+以下最佳实践只适用于 legacy API。新 Log hard cutover 时应以 PRJ-0002 Log 设计包为准。\n@@\n ## 5. 性能与优化\n+\n+以下性能说明只覆盖 legacy `Trace/Debug` 条件编译和等级过滤，不代表高密度 AI-first 日志的完整性能策略。新策略要求 `IsEnabled` / lazy fields / buffered JSONL / stdout summary，不能把详细日志逐条刷 `Console.WriteLine`。\n*** End Patch\n"
}
```

### 000588 message `assistant`

## Handoff Summary

**Task Context**
- User asked to continue deep-thinking the Log tool design, specifically questioning whether current Godot API printing (`GD.PrintRich`, `GD.PushError`) should remain now that logs are mainly for AI analysis.
- Must answer in Chinese by default.
- Current repo: `/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/SlimeAI`.
- Skill used: `systemagent-deepthink`; later `systemagent-retrospective` style sanity check was considered.
- This turn was design/documentation only. No runtime code was changed.

**Key Decisions Made**
- Existing Log design package already existed at:
  `SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/Tool/10.Log/`
- Added/updated the sink decision:
  - AI-first default output should not use Godot API / Godot Output panel.
  - Default detailed facts: C# buffered JSONL file sink.
  - Default visible summary: C# stdout summary sink (`Console.Out` / `Console.WriteLine`) for flow summaries, validation verdicts, key warn/error only.
  - Validation: memory/artifact sink.
  - `GD.PrintRich`, `GD.PushWarning`, `GD.PushError`: optional `GodotEditorSink`, default off, only for human/editor debug.
  - Do not naïvely replace everything with per-log `Console.WriteLine`; stdout IO can also bottleneck. High-density logs should be buffered JSONL + stdout summaries.

**Docs Updated**
- `SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/Tool/10.Log/README.md`
  - Added “Sink 裁决：默认避开 Godot API”.
- `.../10.Log/01-现状分析与AI-first裁决.md`
  - Added evidence and decision about `GD.PrintRich` vs C# stdout/file.
- `.../10.Log/02-目标架构与数据契约.md`
  - Changed sink model to:
    `C# stdout summary sink`, `buffered jsonl file sink`, `memory`, `validation artifact`, optional `Godot editor sink`.
- `.../10.Log/03-控制面与CLI设计.md`
  - Added profile controls for `stdout-summary`, `jsonl-buffered-file`, and `godot-editor`.
- `DocsAI/ECS/Tools/Logger/README.md`
  - Added sink decision and updated current direction.
- `DocsAI/ECS/Tools/Logger/Concepts/logger.md`
  - Marked as `legacy-reference`; clarified old “why GD.PrintRich instead of Console” only applies to human editor debugging.
- `SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/INDEX.md`
  - Updated `Tool/10.Log` entries to 2026-06-09 and sink decision.
- `SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/Core/progress.md`
  - Updated Latest Resume and added P052 `log-sink-csharp-stdout-jsonl-decision`.
- `Core/notes.md`, `Core/roadmap.md`, project `README.md`
  - Updated references and next-SDD wording.

**External References Used**
- Context7 `/dotnet/docs`:
  - `Console.WriteLine` writes standard output.
  - .NET custom logger examples check `IsEnabled` before `Console.WriteLine`.
  - High-performance logging recommends `LoggerMessage` / source-generated approaches.
- Context7 `/godotengine/godot-docs`:
  - `GD.PrintRich` / `print_rich` supports BBCode rich text, editor Output and stdout.
  - `GD.PushError` / `GD.PushWarning` are debugger/terminal error/warning sinks, not test assertion facts.

**Validation Done**
- `git diff --check` passed.
- `python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py validate --all` still fails due to pre-existing unrelated:
  - `SDD-0034-design-directory-restructure`
  - `ERROR SDD015 template-residue-in-done`
  - `WARN SDD025 thin-design-in-done`
- This failure is not from the Log docs changed in this task.
- `rg` check found and fixed a conflicting legacy document (`DocsAI/ECS/Tools/Logger/Concepts/logger.md`). Note: one `rg` command had shell backtick expansion issue, but later content was handled.

**Current Git State Notes**
- There are many pre-existing dirty changes unrelated to this task, including:
  - PRJ-0001 docs changes
  - deleted old long-named `Tool/10.Log,...` directory
  - untracked new `Tool/10.Log/`
  - `.uid` changes
  - `Workspace/Resources/`
- Do not revert or clean any of these.
- This task only added/updated Log-related docs and PRJ-0002 project metadata.

**What Remains**
- If user wants implementation next:
  1. Create an execution SDD, likely named `Log AI-first Observation Hard Cutover`.
  2. First implementation phase should design/implement sink abstraction:
     - `JsonlBufferedFileSink`
     - `StdoutSummarySink`
     - `MemorySink`
     - `ArtifactSink`
     - optional `GodotEditorSink`
  3. Migrate `Log.cs` away from direct `GD.PrintRich` in default path.
  4. Add `IsEnabled` / lazy fields before constructing log payloads.
  5. Update Validation helper and runner analyzer so PASS/FAIL comes from artifacts/structured logs, not stdout markers.
- If continuing documentation:
  - Check if any other Logger docs still imply `GD.PrintRich` is preferred default.
  - Possibly update `DocsAI/ECS/Tools/Logger/Usage.md` further to mention new sink decision, though it already says legacy API.

````json
      "content": [
        {
          "type": "input_text",
          "text": "$systemagent-deepthink \n### Log工具\n参考SlimeAI-AiFirst/GameOS/Observation\nDocsAI/ECS框架与AIFirst方向决策.md\nSDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/Tool/10.Log\n.ai-config/skills/godot/godot-scene-test\n要用最新aifirst-ecs框架的思想，ai优先的思想深度分析当前ecs框架\n以ai优先的思想去考虑，允许完全重构，如果要重构就不要考虑兼任，要完全升级\n\n我认为要重新思考：\n- 然后是Log等级的问题，看看要不要改\n- 最后是开关的问题，现在开关似乎有点麻烦，比如一个代码的Log是打开还是关闭，level提高就是不打印了，如果可以直接用CLI控制就更好了，深度思考，一切以ai为主，你看看怎么做，有没有必要，深度思考。\n- 而且打印的信息需要对ai分析有帮助才行，没必要的信息不需要打印\n- Log其实和测试代码我认为很有关联，现在最新的测试好像不是用Log，而是使用Fail之类的，封装成函数也许，这个是godot原生的吗？这不行，要统一用Log管理才对\n\t- 检查其他测试代码有没有这个问题\n- 更新相关文档\n#### 打印什么信息\n- ai为主，你来发挥，但是我要提醒一下，log运行几秒就有几百条，不能冗余，要包括有用的信息，而且要实时调整，ai要分析出哪些log不需要的可以关掉，我感觉可以用CLI,你怎么看，还是说用一个文件来决定哪些开哪些观，深度思考\n\t- Log打印时间戳好像没用，还不如打印游戏运行了多久，深度思考\n\n深度思考详细分析广泛搜索web,ctx7相关资料\n\n### 2\n问题：现在的分析Log都是直接将所有打印信息放在一个文档然后丢给AI分析，这种强行让AI来分析经常出问题，经常让AI分析了好几次，问题还是没解决，就是因为没有规范流程，怎么分析也没有固定，其实怎么分析要固定下来，这个功能到底有没有问题其实可以确定的，多写点代码即可\n- 其实Log远远没这么简单，Log不能单独来看，要结合Test的具体需求来看，要分析什么样的Log对ai有价值，对分析游戏有价值，跟Test的沟通可以先放下，先写成TODO，现在先优化Log\n- 而且现在的log是一直打印，没有分游戏阶段，虽然现在还没有写游戏阶段，但是这个要提前考虑提前写好\n- 其实现在log太分散了，不足以来分析，我认为的适合ai的分析是一个过程执行完之后直接输出一大段需要的数据，刚好record可以轻松完整地转换成字符串，比如施放技能就把这个技能从头到尾所有东西都放在一起，到结束了才一起打印，以过程来打印而不是每个地方都分散地打印，集合在一起打印比分散打印分析起来容易很多，集合打印信息要单独`[]`标志来区分\n- 其实这种顺序打印不能直接交给ai分析，要先用脚本来划分拆分整理成一个目录再给ai分析，当然也不能任由ai发挥，要有详细的说明文档让ai学会怎么去分析这些信息\n- 怎么写Log要有一个流程，不要让AI随便发挥，这里一个log那里一个log,然后打印了大量没用信息，分析也不知道怎么分析，当然Log\n- 你区分一下Log和分析，这是两个东西，1.Log是一套固定流程的打印信息，是固定的，然后通过脚本将这些信息进行整理然后给AI分析。2.AI分析Log,也有好几个部分，对应不同部分的代码有不同的分析流程，现在DocsAI功能基本都有一个Test,我认为还要再额外多加一个Log,专门来写怎么分析Log信息，可能每个功能都要写一个Log怎么分析\n\n### Src/的代码Log重构\n这个重构很大，基本上每个要Log的地方都要考虑，你先写一下大概思路，每个功能的Log文档包括：1.Log思路，2.怎么分析Log来判断是否有问题，我想到的就只有这些，然后你来补充\n\n### 补充\n其实Log、Debug、Test(包括TDD)是相互联系的，是项目级别的思考，没做好的地方要写TODO，要补充的地方还有很多\n\n---\n深度思考详细分析广泛搜索相关内容，这次prompt内容很多，不过很多内容有相似的地方，相似的内容其实也包括很多新的思考，这些思考不要丢掉，不要过度简化，要把关键的思考关键要点都记录下来，然后重构设计文档，必要时可以生成新文档删掉旧文档"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "message",
      "role": "user",
      "content": [
        {
          "type": "input_text",
          "text": "现在的打印信息是godot api实现的，其实C#应该也有终端命令行啊，本身也能打印啊，而且直接用C#的打印应该更好，性能更高，调用godot api性能低，之前用godotapi是因为godot打印能够在godot里面显示多种颜色，但现在是给ai分析，不需要人来看，那就不需要了，所以要重新思考，深度分析"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "message",
      "role": "developer",
      "content": [
        {
          "type": "input_text",
          "text": "<permissions instructions>\nFilesystem sandboxing defines which files can be read or written. `sandbox_mode` is `danger-full-access`: No filesystem sandboxing - all commands are permitted.           "text": "<collaboration_mode># Collaboration Mode: Default\n\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\n\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\n\n## request_user_input availability\n\nUse the `request_user_input` tool only when it is listed in the available tools for this turn.\n\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\n</collaboration_mode>"
        },

Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths after expanding the matching alias from `### Skill roots`.\n- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.\n- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.\n- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):\n  1) After deciding to use a skill, expand the listed short `path` with the matching alias from `### Skill roots`, then open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.\n  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the directory containing that expanded `SKILL.md` first, and only consider other paths if needed.\n  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.\n  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.\n  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.\n- Coordination and sequencing:\n  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.\n  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.\n- Context hygiene:\n  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.\n  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.\n  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.\n- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.\n</skills_instructions>"

          "type": "input_text",
          "text": "# AGENTS.md instructions for /home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/SlimeAI\n\n<INSTRUCTIONS>\n# Global Rules\n\n- 默认中文回答；命令、代码、错误信息保留原文。\n- 注释要用中文\n- 不确定就说明，不要猜。\n- 大任务先计划，再执行。\n- 改文件前先读相关文件，改完总结改动和验证结果。\n- 能验证就跑构建/测试，不能验证说明原因。\n- 不要随意加依赖、大重构、commit、push。\n\n## CLI First\n\n- 优先 CLI / 项目脚本，不默认用 MCP。\n- 常用工具：`rg`, `fd`, `tree`, `eza`, `bat`, `jq`, `git`, `gh`, `lazygit`, `curl`, `http`, `fc`, `dotnet`, `docker`。\n- `fc` 是 `firecrawl` 的 wrapper，用法和 `firecrawl` 完全一样；不用直接执行 `firecrawl`，因为当前环境直接执行会走 `ALL_PROXY=socks5h://...`，容易报 `Error: protocol mismatch`。\n- 如果常用工具不可用，不要卡住；改用基础命令，例如 `cat`, `ls`, `find`, `grep`, `sed`。\n- GitHub 源码分析优先 clone 到本地后用 `rg/fd/bat/tree`。\n- **代码语义搜索优先 `semble`**：自然语言查询相关代码片段，比 grep 节省约 98% Token，纯 CPU 无需 API Key。已生成 `.claude/agents/semble-search.md` 子代理配置。用法：`semble search \"<query>\" [path]`，`semble find-related <file> <line> [path]`。\n- Godot C# 构建优先 `dotnet build`，必要时 `godot --headless --build-solutions --path .`。\n- 使用不熟悉的外部 CLI 前，先运行 `--help`，不要猜参数。\n- 外部工具 / Skill / MCP / 浏览器自动化只在明确需要时使用；高风险或写操作前先说明并确认。\n\n## Git Safety\n\n- 涉及文件修改时，前后必须 `git status --short` 确认范围。\n- 默认不要完整 `git diff`，除非需要自查或用户要求。\n- 不要覆盖、回滚、删除用户已有改动。\n- **AI 可自动 commit**。每次 commit 必须：\n  1. 先 `git status --short` 确认本轮改动范围；\n  2. commit message 明确说明 What / Why / 来源 OpenSpec change（如有）；\n  3. 不混入用户既有未追踪/未提交改动；\n  4. 跨 git 边界（工作区根 / SlimeAI/ / Games/<Game>/）分别 commit。\n- **默认不要 `git push`**。push 必须用户明确确认或在自动化任务的 `--push` 显式标记下执行。\n- 禁止 `git push --force`、`git reset --hard <remote>`、`git rebase --onto`、`git filter-branch` 等改写历史的操作，除非用户明确要求并说明回滚预案。\n- 禁止跨仓库把一个 git 边界的改动 add 到另一个仓库。\n- 完成 OpenSpec change 时，**archive + baseline 合入 + commit 是默认动作**，不再要求用户单独授权。push 仍需确认。\n\n## Safety\n\n- 危险命令必须先确认：`rm -rf`, `git reset --hard`, `git clean -fd`, `git push --force`, 删除大量文件, 覆盖配置文件。\n- 如果 sandbox / bwrap 导致命令失败，不要反复重试同一命令；换基础命令或说明需要授权。\n\n<!-- context7 -->\nUse the `ctx7` CLI to fetch current documentation whenever the user asks about a library, framework, SDK, API, CLI tool, or cloud service -- even well-known ones like React, Next.js, Prisma, Express, Tailwind, Django, or Spring Boot. This includes API syntax, configuration, version migration, library-specific debugging, setup instructions, and CLI tool usage. Use even when you think you know the answer -- your training data may not reflect recent changes. Prefer this over web search for library docs.\n\nDo not use for: refactoring, writing scripts from scratch, debugging business logic, code review, or general programming concepts.\n\n## Steps\n\n1. Resolve library: `npx ctx7@latest library <name> \"<user's question>\"` — use the official library name with proper punctuation (e.g., \"Next.js\" not \"nextjs\", \"Customer.io\" not \"customerio\", \"Three.js\" not \"threejs\")\n2. Pick the best match (ID format: `/org/project`) by: exact name match, description relevance, code snippet count, source reputation (High/Medium preferred), and benchmark score (higher is better). If results don't look right, try alternate names or queries (e.g., \"next.js\" not \"nextjs\", or rephrase the question)\n3. Fetch docs: `npx ctx7@latest docs <libraryId> \"<user's question>\"`\n4. Answer using the fetched documentation\n\nYou MUST call `library` first to get a valid ID unless the user provides one directly in `/org/project` format. Use the user's full question as the query -- specific and detailed queries return better results than vague single words. Do not run more than 3 commands per question. Do not include sensitive information (API keys, passwords, credentials) in queries.\n\nFor version-specific docs, use `/org/project/version` from the `library` output (e.g., `/vercel/next.js/v14.3.0`).\n\nIf a command fails with a quota error, inform the user and suggest `npx ctx7@latest login` or setting `CONTEXT7_API_KEY` env var for higher limits. Do not silently fall back to training data.\nRun Context7 CLI requests outside Codex's default sandbox. If a Context7 CLI command fails with DNS or network errors such as ENOTFOUND, host resolution failures, or fetch failed, rerun it outside the sandbox instead of retrying inside the sandbox.\n<!-- context7 -->\n\n--- project-doc ---\n\n# SlimeAI ECS 框架仓规则\n\n## 定位\n\n这是 SlimeAI ECS 框架仓，也是 AI 主目录。优先目标是让 AI 能稳定路由、验证和复盘：入口少、事实源少、命令可重复、artifact 可检查。\n\n默认入口：\n\n```text\nAGENTS.md -> DocsAI/README.md -> DocsAI/ECS/README.md -> SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/README.md -> SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/INDEX.md -> DocsAI/ECS/<Runtime|Capabilities|Tools|UI>/<owner>/完整文档 -> owner skill -> 验证脚本\n```\n\nSystemAgent 不作为 ECS 业务事实源第一入口；它只作为流程工具（设计发现、SDD 管理、AI config 同步、验证发布、复盘）。\n\n## Git 边界\n\n- 当前仓：`/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/SlimeAI`。\n- 外层资源：`/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Resources`，只作显式研究输入。\n- 游戏仓：`/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Games/*`，需要时单独进入对应仓运行 `git status --short`。\n- 游戏 submodule：`Games/*/SlimeAI/` 仍是只读镜像，禁止直接做框架业务改动。\n- 不把外层 `/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI` 描述为当前 AI 配置仓。\n\n框架改动默认在当前仓处理；游戏仓或外层资源目录只在任务明确涉及时访问。\n\n执行 git status、git diff、commit、branch 等操作前，必须先确认当前 Git 边界。\n\n## 必读入口\n\n- 方向入口：`DocsAI/README.md`\n- 框架文档：`DocsAI/ECS/README.md`（按 Runtime / Capabilities / Tools / UI 聚合）\n- 当前项目设计：`SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/README.md`\n- 设计索引：`SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/INDEX.md`\n- 模块事实源：Runtime owner 读 `DocsAI/ECS/Runtime/<Entity|Data|Event|System>/`；功能 owner 读 `DocsAI/ECS/Capabilities/<owner>/`；工具和 UI 读 `DocsAI/ECS/Tools/<owner>/`、`DocsAI/ECS/UI/`。\n- Data 当前说明：`DocsAI/ECS/Runtime/Data/Data系统说明.md`\n- 设计思考：`DocsAI/思考/`\n- 流程工具：`Workspace/SystemAgent/README.md`\n- Godot 场景测试：`Src/ECS/Test/**` 测试源码、`Games/BrotatoLike/Tools/run-godot-scene.sh`\n\n## 事实源边界\n\n- `DocsAI/`：框架文档统一入口，AI-first 设计。默认按 `Runtime / Capabilities / Tools / UI` 聚合；owner 文档优先有清晰 `README.md` 或完整事实源文档，Concept / Usage / Tests / InputMap 等只是可选分层，不强制拆分。旧 `System/`、`Component/`、`Entity/`、`Data/`、`Event/` 只作为迁移追溯，不作为新任务入口。\n- `SDD/`：中大型任务设计、进度、执行记忆。项目级 SDD 在 `SDD/project/projects/`。\n- `Src/ECS/**`：源码入口；框架 Markdown 文档统一由 `DocsAI/ECS/` 管理，`Src/ECS` 不保留框架文档。\n- `.ai-config/skills/*`：唯一可维护 skill 源，保存 skill 路由、命令、reference 和脚本入口。\n- `.ai-config/rules/rules.md`：rule 源。\n- `.claude/.codex.devin.trae/skills`、`AGENTS.md`、`CLAUDE.md`、`.devin/rules/devinrules.md`：同步副本，不直接维护。\n- `.claude/settings.json`、`.claude/agents/`、`.codex/hooks.json`、`.codex/agents/`、`.codex/config.toml`：hook/subagent 运行配置，直接维护，不走 `.ai-config` 同步。\n- `Workspace/SystemAgent/`：流程、角色、gate、hook、skill-test 工具。\n- `Workspace/SDD/`：SDD CLI、模板和校验规则。\n- `Workspace/DocsAI/`：工作区级文档（Git submodule、多游戏架构、AI 流程），与框架文档分离。\n- `openspec/`：仅保留历史资产和显式兼容维护入口，不作为默认计划或执行入口。\n\n## 修改规则\n\n- 默认中文回答；命令、代码、错误信息保留原文。\n- 改文件前先读相关文件；涉及文件修改时前后运行 `git status --short`。\n- 大型功能、架构变更、跨模块重构、长期设计决策优先使用 SDD。\n- 不要把 BrotatoLike 专属玩法、UI、资产路径上提为框架默认。\n- 不随意加依赖、大重构。AI 可自动 commit（需先 `git status --short` + 明确 message）；push 需确认。\n- 不覆盖、回滚、删除用户已有改动。\n\n## Git 操作约束\n\n- 执行任何 git 操作前，先确认当前 Git 边界。\n- 更新游戏仓的 SlimeAI submodule：优先使用 VSCode Task `update: BrotatoLike SlimeAI Submodule`。\n- 手动更新时：\n  1. `cd Games/<Game>`（不是框架仓）\n  2. `git submodule update --remote SlimeAI`\n  3. 如报错\"未跟踪文件将被覆盖\"：先在 `SlimeAI/` 目录内处理（提交到框架仓或 `git clean -fd`）\n  4. 最后在游戏仓 `git add SlimeAI && git commit`\n- 禁止在游戏仓的 `SlimeAI/` 目录内直接做业务改动。\n- `**/*.uid` 已在框架仓 `.gitignore` 中全局忽略；如发现未跟踪 `.uid` 文件，先确认 `.gitignore` 是否生效。\n\n## 工作区视野约束\n\n- 日常开发关注：当前仓（`Src/`、`SDD/`、`DocsAI/`、`.ai-config/`）、`Games/BrotatoLike/`\n- `Resources/Engine/` —— 引擎源码与框架分析报告，研究参考时查阅\n- `Resources/Games/` —— 破解游戏逆向素材与分析文档，游戏机制参考时查阅\n- `Resources/Agent/` —— 外部 AI 项目分析，agent 工作流参考时查阅\n- `Resources/Else/` —— 旧框架代码，仅迁移对照，禁止作为事实源\n\n## AI 配置统一源\n\n本仓同时维护 Claude、Codex、Devin、Trae 的 skill、rule、command、hook 和 subagent。**skill/rule/command 使用 `.ai-config` 统一源；hook/subagent 直接写工具项目配置。**\n\n| 类型 | 维护位置 | 副本位置 | 同步方式 |\n| ---- | ------ | -------- | -------- |\n| Skill | `.ai-config/skills/<category>/<name>/SKILL.md` | `.codex/skills/`、`.claude/skills/`、`.devin/skills/`、`.trae/skills/`（打平） | `bash Workspace/Tools/ai-config-sync/sync-ai-config.sh` |\n| Rule | `.ai-config/rules/rules.md` | `AGENTS.md`、`CLAUDE.md`、`.devin/rules/devinrules.md`（Trae 共用 AGENTS.md） | 同上（Devin 副本由脚本自动追加 frontmatter） |\n| Command | `.ai-config/skills/<category>/<name>/SKILL.md` | `.claude/commands/opsx/*.md`（仅兼容命令需要时生成） | 同上（脚本自动转换格式） |\n| Claude hook | `.claude/settings.json` | 无副本 | 直接维护 |\n| Claude subagent | `.claude/agents/*.md` | 无副本 | 直接维护 |\n| Codex hook | `.codex/hooks.json` | 无副本 | 直接维护 |\n| Codex subagent | `.codex/agents/*.toml`、`.codex/config.toml` | 无副本 | 直接维护 |\n\n**skill/rule/command 只改 `.ai-config/`，不改副本**。脚本通过遍历实现，不硬编码分类名；`.ai-config/skills/` 下一层目录作为分类，skill 目录在分类下，同步时自动打平到各工具顶层。\n\n**禁止直接修改同步副本**：`.codex/skills/`、`.claude/skills/`、`.devin/skills/`、`.trae/skills/`、`.claude/commands/opsx/`、`AGENTS.md`、`CLAUDE.md`、`.devin/rules/devinrules.md`。\n改完后**必须**运行 `bash Workspace/Tools/ai-config-sync/sync-ai-config.sh`，否则副本会被下次同步覆盖。\n\n**允许直接修改项目运行配置**：`.claude/settings.json`、`.claude/agents/`、`.codex/hooks.json`、`.codex/agents/`、`.codex/config.toml`。这些不是 `.ai-config` 同步副本。\n\n## SDD 工作流\n\n- SDD 是中大型任务的默认计划、执行记忆和恢复事实源；格式与 CLI 以 `Workspace/SDD/` 为准。\n- 大型功能、架构变更、跨模块重构、长期设计决策、迁移账本和跨目录文档治理，优先进入 `SDD/project/projects/`。\n- 探索阶段可普通分析，只读代码和文档，不直接改实现；深度思考 / 需求确认使用 `systemagent-deepthink`。只有需要任务落盘、跨会话恢复或正式执行记忆时，才进入 `sdd-workflow` / `sdd-management`。\n- 创建和管理任务使用 `sdd-workflow` / `sdd-management`，并维护 `README.md`、`design/`、`tasks.md`、`progress.md`、`bdd.md`。\n- 执行中每完成一批任务，及时更新对应 `tasks.md` checkbox 和 `progress.md` Latest Resume，并同步必要的 `DocsAI/ECS/`、SDD design 或游戏侧状态文档。\n- 完成后按影响面运行验证；文档类至少检查 `python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py validate <sdd-id>` 和目标文件清单，代码类按下方验证入口执行。\n- 极小修复、拼写、链接、注释、临时排查和一次性脚本不强制使用 SDD；必要时仍更新相关状态文档。\n\n## ECS 架构红线\n\n**Entity 生命周期**\n- ❌ 直接 `new Entity()` → 必须 `EntityManager.Spawn/Register`\n- ❌ 直接 `entity.QueueFree()` → 必须 `EntityManager.Destroy`\n\n**数据存储**\n- ❌ Component 私有业务状态字段（`_currentHp`、`_moveSpeed`）→ 存 `Data`\n- ❌ `Data.On()` 监听数据变化 → 用 `Entity.Events`\n- ❌ 字符串字面量访问 Data（`\"CurrentHp\"`）→ 用 descriptor 生成的 typed `DataKey<T>`\n- ❌ 新增 `const string` / `DataMeta` DataKey → 先写 DataOS descriptor，再生成 typed handle\n\n**Data 规则（SDD-0022 后状态）**\n- 新增 DataKey 先写 DataOS descriptor。\n- runtime snapshot 是运行时字段定义与 records 的来源。\n- generated handle 是业务访问入口。\n- 不恢复旧 `DataMeta` / `DataRegistry` / `DataKey_Compatibility` 作为事实源。\n\n**通信**\n- ❌ Godot Signal 处理核心逻辑 → 用 `EventBus`\n- ❌ 直接调用其他 Component 方法 → 用 `Entity.Events`\n\n**资源加载**\n- ❌ `GD.Load<T>(\"res://...\")` / `ResourceLoader.Load(...)` → 用 `ResourceManagement.Load`\n\n**系统调用**\n- ❌ `new Timer()` / `GetTree().CreateTimer()` → 用 `TimerManager`\n- ❌ `GetTree().GetNodesInGroup()` / 手写距离计算 → 用 `TargetSelector`\n- ❌ 直接修改 `CurrentHp` → 用 `DamageService.Instance.Process()`\n- ❌ 手写暴击/闪避/冷却/充能/范围检测 → 用对应系统组件\n- ❌ 手动 `new` + `QueueFree()` 高频对象 → 用对象池\n- ❌ `_Process` 中禁止 `new` 对象和 LINQ\n\n## 交互规则\n\n- 必须使用中文回复\n- 避免删除再创建文件，尽量修改文件\n- 禁止使用 PowerShell 命令\n- 新增或修改的代码要增加适当注释\n- 修改框架相关实现/接口/流程后，必须同步更新对应 Skill 文档\n\n## 验证入口\n\n框架验证：\n\n```bash\ncd /home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/SlimeAI\ndotnet build Brotato_my.csproj --no-restore /clp:ErrorsOnly\nbash Data/DataOS/Tools/validate-dataos.sh Data/DataOS/Authoring/slimeainew.authoring.db\n```\n\nSDD / AI 配置验证：\n\n```bash\ncd /home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/SlimeAI\npython3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py validate --all\nbash Workspace/Tools/ai-config-sync/sync-ai-config.sh\nbash Workspace/SystemAgent/Tools/skill-test/lint.sh static all --no-fail --summary-only\n```\n\nGodot 场景验证仍需要进入承载游戏仓：\n\n```bash\ncd /home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/Games/<GameWithRunner>\nTools/run-godot-scene.sh run res://Scenes/Main.tscn --timeout 10 --log-dir .ai-temp/scene-tests/runs\nTools/analyze-godot-scene-logs.sh\n```\n\n</INSTRUCTIONS>"

Here is the summary produced by the other language model, use the information in this summary to assist with your own analysis:\n## Handoff Summary\n\n**Task Context**\n- User asked to continue deep-thinking the Log tool design, specifically questioning whether current Godot API printing (`GD.PrintRich`, `GD.PushError`) should remain now that logs are mainly for AI analysis.\n- Must answer in Chinese by default.\n- Current repo: `/home/slime/Code/SlimeAI/SlimeAI`.\n- Skill used: `systemagent-deepthink`; later `systemagent-retrospective` style sanity check was considered.\n- This turn was design/documentation only. No runtime code was changed.\n\n**Key Decisions Made**\n- Existing Log design package already existed at:\n  `SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/Tool/10.Log/`\n- Added/updated the sink decision:\n  - AI-first default output should not use Godot API / Godot Output panel.\n  - Default detailed facts: C# buffered JSONL file sink.\n  - Default visible summary: C# stdout summary sink (`Console.Out` / `Console.WriteLine`) for flow summaries, validation verdicts, key warn/error only.\n  - Validation: memory/artifact sink.\n  - `GD.PrintRich`, `GD.PushWarning`, `GD.PushError`: optional `GodotEditorSink`, default off, only for human/editor debug.\n  - Do not naïvely replace everything with per-log `Console.WriteLine`; stdout IO can also bottleneck. High-density logs should be buffered JSONL + stdout summaries.\n\n**Docs Updated**\n- `SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/Tool/10.Log/README.md`\n  - Added “Sink 裁决：默认避开 Godot API”.\n- `.../10.Log/01-现状分析与AI-first裁决.md`\n  - Added evidence and decision about `GD.PrintRich` vs C# stdout/file.\n- `.../10.Log/02-目标架构与数据契约.md`\n  - Changed sink model to:\n    `C# stdout summary sink`, `buffered jsonl file sink`, `memory`, `validation artifact`, optional `Godot editor sink`.\n- `.../10.Log/03-控制面与CLI设计.md`\n  - Added profile controls for `stdout-summary`, `jsonl-buffered-file`, and `godot-editor`.\n- `DocsAI/ECS/Tools/Logger/README.md`\n  - Added sink decision and updated current direction.\n- `DocsAI/ECS/Tools/Logger/Concepts/logger.md`\n  - Marked as `legacy-reference`; clarified old “why GD.PrintRich instead of Console” only applies to human editor debugging.\n- `SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/design/INDEX.md`\n  - Updated `Tool/10.Log` entries to 2026-06-09 and sink decision.\n- `SDD/project/projects/PRJ-0002-ecs-framework-refactor/Core/progress.md`\n  - Updated Latest Resume and added P052 `log-sink-csharp-stdout-jsonl-decision`.\n- `Core/notes.md`, `Core/roadmap.md`, project `README.md`\n  - Updated references and next-SDD wording.\n\n**External References Used**\n- Context7 `/dotnet/docs`:\n  - `Console.WriteLine` writes standard output.\n  - .NET custom logger examples check `IsEnabled` before `Console.WriteLine`.\n  - High-performance logging recommends `LoggerMessage` / source-generated approaches.\n- Context7 `/godotengine/godot-docs`:\n  - `GD.PrintRich` / `print_rich` supports BBCode rich text, editor Output and stdout.\n  - `GD.PushError` / `GD.PushWarning` are debugger/terminal error/warning sinks, not test assertion facts.\n\n**Validation Done**\n- `git diff --check` passed.\n- `python3 Workspace/SDD/sdd.py validate --all` still fails due to pre-existing unrelated:\n  - `SDD-0034-design-directory-restructure`\n  - `ERROR SDD015 template-residue-in-done`\n  - `WARN SDD025 thin-design-in-done`\n- This failure is not from the Log docs changed in this task.\n- `rg` check found and fixed a conflicting legacy document (`DocsAI/ECS/Tools/Logger/Concepts/logger.md`). Note: one `rg` command had shell backtick expansion issue, but later content was handled.\n\n**Current Git State Notes**\n- There are many pre-existing dirty changes unrelated to this task, including:\n  - PRJ-0001 docs changes\n  - deleted old long-named `Tool/10.Log,...` directory\n  - untracked new `Tool/10.Log/`\n  - `.uid` changes\n  - `Workspace/Resources/`\n- Do not revert or clean any of these.\n- This task only added/updated Log-related docs and PRJ-0002 project metadata.\n\n**What Remains**\n- If user wants implementation next:\n  1. Create an execution SDD, likely named `Log AI-first Observation Hard Cutover`.\n  2. First implementation phase should design/implement sink abstraction:\n     - `JsonlBufferedFileSink`\n     - `StdoutSummarySink`\n     - `MemorySink`\n     - `ArtifactSink`\n     - optional `GodotEditorSink`\n  3. Migrate `Log.cs` away from direct `GD.PrintRich` in default path.\n  4. Add `IsEnabled` / lazy fields before constructing log payloads.\n  5. Update Validation helper and runner analyzer so PASS/FAIL comes from artifacts/structured logs, not stdout markers.\n- If continuing documentation:\n  - Check if any other Logger docs still imply `GD.PrintRich` is preferred default.\n  - Possibly update `DocsAI/ECS/Tools/Logger/Usage.md` further to mention new sink decision, though it already says legacy API.\n\n"
        }
````

```text
---
name: systemagent-deepthink
description: SystemAgent 深度思考 / 需求确认能力。用于用户要求深度思考、广泛搜索、方案设计、方向确认、不要急着实现，或需求零散缺信息且需要先识别问题是否存在、思路是否成立、风险、方案、默认假设和必须向用户确认的问题。
---

# systemagent-deepthink

## 定位

这是 SystemAgent 的 standalone capability skill，不是 SDD workflow，也不是 workflow entry wrapper。

它吸收 `superpowers:brainstorming` 的核心价值：先读上下文、识别范围、提出 2-3 个方案、说明推荐、暴露确认点；但不照搬 hook 强制触发、逐问逐答、默认写 `docs/superpowers/specs/` 或设计阶段自动 commit。

默认假设：用户给出的信息通常不完整，甚至可能把症状、根因、目标和方案混在一起。DeepThink 必须先帮助用户判断“问题是否真实存在”“当前思路有没有问题”“缺哪些信息和决策”，再进入方案推荐。

## 触发条件

- 用户要求深度思考、方案设计、设计确认或不要直接实现。
- 用户要求广泛搜索、详细分析、全面排查、帮忙找没说明清楚的问题。
- 用户提供的内容零散、目标/边界/成功标准不清，继续实现容易走错方向。
- 新功能、重构、迁移、workflow/skill/rule/gate/policy 改动进入计划或 SDD 前需要冻结方向。
- 实施中发现设计矛盾、范围过大、风险未处理、验收空洞或上下文不足。

## 必读

- `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/DeepThink.md`
- `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/DesignCritic.md`（large 或高风险 medium 时）
- 相关 route、owner skill、DocsAI 或 SystemAgent fact source，按当前任务最小读取。
- 本地证据搜索结果：优先 `rg` / `semble` / 项目脚本，覆盖相关源码、文档、历史设计、现有约束和验证入口；记录搜索范围和未覆盖区域。
- 外部资料：仅当用户明确要求、任务依赖当前版本/官方 API/法规/价格/新闻等易变信息，或本地事实不足以判断时使用；必须区分 Evidence / Inference / Unknown。
- 只有任务使用正式 SDD、需要跨会话恢复或需要落盘时，才读取 `Workspace/SDD/docs/SDDFormat.md`、`Workspace/SDD/docs/CLI.md` 和当前 SDD 的 `README.md`、`design/INDEX.md`、`tasks.md`、`progress.md`、`bdd.md`。

## 输出结构

遵循 `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/DeepThink.md` 的确认包字段：

1. Goal：本任务要解决什么问题和非目标。
2. Context Read：已读取的事实源、未读上下文和 git boundary。
3. Evidence / Search Coverage：搜索过什么、证据是什么、哪些没覆盖。
4. Problem Reality Check：问题是否真实存在，证据、推断和未知项分别是什么。
5. Idea Check：用户当前思路是否成立，是否存在目标错位、根因跳跃或方案过大。
6. Problem Shape：需求缺口、隐藏假设和可能误解，必须分清思路问题、信息缺口、决策未定。
7. Main Risks：实施、维护、验证和边界风险。
8. Options：2-3 个可选方案及取舍，至少包含一个更小、更易验证的方案。
9. Recommendation：推荐方案和原因。
10. Must Confirm：不确认就不能安全推进的问题，按思路问题 / 信息缺口 / 决策未定分组。
11. Should Confirm：建议确认但可用默认值推进的问题。
12. Defaults I Will Use：用户不补充时采用的默认假设。
13. Not Recommended：不建议方向和原因。
14. Artifact Updates：需要写入的 design、tasks、bdd、progress、notes 或无需落盘的原因。

## 确认问题落点

- 不使用 SDD 时：最终回复必须有醒目的 `需要确认` 小节，列出 Must Confirm；若能用默认值推进，也列出 `默认假设`。
- 使用 SDD 或已有设计文档时：把问题写在设计文档内的 `## Must Confirm`、`## Should Confirm`、`## Defaults I Will Use` 标题下，不单独创建问题文档。
- 用户最终裁决、采用的默认假设和恢复点写入 `progress.md`；可执行事项写入 `tasks.md`；行为预期写入 `bdd.md`；参考来源和开放问题写入 `notes.md`。
- `Artifact Updates` 必须说明本轮写入位置，或说明为什么只在聊天中输出。
- 追问必须通俗、具体、可回答；推荐格式是“问题 -> 为什么问 -> 不回答时默认值 / 影响”。

## 实施门禁

- `Must Confirm` 未解决时，不进入实现。
- 用户回复“按你的建议执行”时，可采用 `Recommendation` 和 `Defaults I Will Use`，但必须把默认假设写入最终回复；使用 SDD 时还要写入 `progress.md`。
- small 任务可压缩为 3-5 行自检，不强制完整确认包。
- 用户明确要求“广泛搜索 / 详细分析”时，不得只凭当前聊天内容输出方案；必须说明搜索范围、证据、推断和未知项。

## 禁止

- 不强制所有小任务都创建 SDD。
- 不把设计文档散落到临时 Idea 目录作为长期事实源。
- 不在设计未清楚时盲目实施大改。
- 不新增 brainstorming hook，不逐问逐答阻塞用户。
- 不复制 `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/DeepThink.md` 或 `Workspace/SystemAgent/Actors/DesignCritic.md` 正文；skill 只做入口。
- 不默认用户提出的问题一定存在，也不默认用户提出的方案一定正确。
- 不用空泛问题代替缺口分析。

```

````text
Output:
# DeepThink

## Responsibility

在任务方向冻结前，把零散需求、上下文、约束和隐含假设转成可审查、可确认、可落盘的方向确认包，避免因为没有向用户确认关键问题而走错实现方向。

默认假设：用户输入通常是不完整的，可能缺目标、事实、边界、成功标准、优先级、反例或约束。DeepThink 的职责不是立刻把用户的想法包装成计划，而是先帮助用户看清：

- 问题是否真实存在，证据是什么，严重程度是否值得处理。
- 用户当前思路是否成立，是否把原因、方案、目标或边界混在一起。
- 哪些信息缺失，哪些决策未定，哪些可以用默认假设安全推进。
- 需要追问用户哪些问题；问题必须通俗、具体、可回答，并说明不确认会影响什么。

## Invocation conditions

- 用户要求“深度思考”“详细分析”“方案设计”“方向确认”“不要急着实现”。
- 用户要求“广泛搜索”“全面排查”“帮我看看有没有问题”或“需要追问我哪些信息”。
- 用户输入明显零散，缺目标、边界、成功标准、优先级或验收口径。
- 新功能、重构、迁移、workflow/skill/rule/gate/policy 改动进入计划或 SDD 前。
- Planner、Reviewer 或 Retrospective 发现设计缺口、范围不清、验证空洞或跨边界风险。

## Required context

- 用户原始请求、验收意图和明确禁止事项。
- 当前 selected workflow、task size、git boundary 和已有 workspace 状态。
- 相关 DocsAI、SystemAgent route、owner skill、policy、gate 或 capability 正文。
- 本地事实源搜索结果：优先用 `rg` / `semble` / 项目脚本覆盖相关源码、文档、历史设计和现有约束；记录搜索范围、关键词或未覆盖区域。
- 外部事实源：仅当任务依赖外部库、官方 API、当前版本、新闻/法规/价格等会变化的信息，或用户明确要求外部搜索时使用；输出中必须区分 Evidence / Inference / Unknown。
- 当前任务若使用正式 SDD：当前 SDD 的 `README.md`、`design/INDEX.md`、`tasks.md`、`progress.md`、`bdd.md`。

## Thinking Procedure

1. **复述目标**：用通俗语言复述用户想解决的问题，并列出非目标；不确定就写 Unknown。
2. **先搜证据**：在输出方案前完成足够广的本地事实源搜索；需要外部资料时按 ResearchAdoption 或当前工具规则获取。广泛搜索不是无限搜索，范围要和任务风险匹配。
3. **判断问题是否存在**：说明有哪些证据证明问题存在、哪些只是猜测、是否可能是误报或症状而非根因。
4. **审查思路是否成立**：检查用户方案是否先入为主、是否跳过更小方案、是否和项目原则或已知约束冲突。
5. **分类需求缺口**：
   - 思路问题：目标错位、根因不成立、方案大于问题、抽象方向不稳、收益不足以覆盖成本。
   - 信息缺口：缺当前行为、目标行为、复现条件、涉及文件、环境版本、验收标准、失败样例或用户禁止事项。
   - 决策未定：范围、优先级、取舍、迁移策略、兼容窗口、失败处理、是否落盘到 SDD。
6. **生成追问**：一次性列出必须确认和建议确认的问题；每个问题都要能被用户直接回答，并说明为什么问、会影响什么、默认值是什么。
7. **提出方案**：给出 2-3 个方案，至少包含一个更小、更易验证的方案；说明推荐方案、风险和不建议方向。

## Output shape

```text
DeepThink:
- Goal:
- Context Read:
- Evidence / Search Coverage:
- Problem Reality Check:
- Idea Check:
- Problem Shape:
- Main Risks:
- Options:
- Recommendation:
- Must Confirm:
- Should Confirm:
- Defaults I Will Use:
- Not Recommended:
- Artifact Updates:
```

## Confirmation policy

- `Must Confirm` 是不确认就不能安全推进的问题；输出后必须提醒用户回答，或等待用户明确接受推荐和默认假设。
- `Should Confirm` 是建议确认的问题；如果用户不回答，可以用 `Defaults I Will Use` 推进。
- `Must Confirm` 必须按类型分组：`思路问题`、`信息缺口`、`决策未定`。没有某类问题时写“暂无”。
- 追问必须通俗具体，避免“你想怎么做？”这类空泛问题。推荐格式是：`问题 -> 为什么要问 -> 不回答时默认值 / 对实现影响`。
- 不使用 SDD 时，最终回复用 `需要确认` 小节承载问题。
- 使用 SDD 或已有设计文档时，把问题写入设计文档标题：`## Must Confirm`、`## Should Confirm`、`## Defaults I Will Use`。用户裁决和采用的默认假设写入 `progress.md`，不要创建单独的“问题清单”文档。

## Role Category

`function_category: authoring`

**Rubric（PASS/FAIL）**：
- **DD-R1 Evidence before options**：输出方案前必须列出已读事实源、搜索覆盖、未读上下文和不确定性。
- **DD-R2 Confirmation clarity**：必须区分 `Must Confirm`、`Should Confirm` 和 `Defaults I Will Use`；`Must Confirm` 必须按思路问题、信息缺口、决策未定分组。
- **DD-R3 Artifact boundary**：如果任务使用 SDD，必须说明确认包写入哪些 SDD 文件；如果不用 SDD，必须说明只在聊天中输出的原因。
- **DD-R4 Problem and idea audit**：必须判断问题是否真实存在、用户思路是否成立、方案是否值得做；不能默认用户提出的方案一定正确。
- **DD-R5 Plain questions**：必须把追问写成用户能直接回答的短问题，并说明为什么问和默认假设。

## Boundary with other actors

| Actor | Boundary |
| --- | --- |
| Planner | Planner 拆任务和排序；DeepThink 先冻结方向、风险、方案和确认点。 |
| DesignCritic | DesignCritic 用批判视角找缺陷、遗漏和替代方案；DeepThink 汇总为用户可确认的方向包。 |
| Reviewer | Reviewer 检查已形成的计划、实现或证据；DeepThink 不输出完成态 verdict。 |
| Implementer | Implementer 按已确认方向修改文件；DeepThink 不直接实现。 |

## Forbidden behavior

- 不写实现代码。
- 不替代用户做最终方向选择。
- 不把不确定推断写成事实。
- 不把用户未说明的目标、范围、验收标准当成已确认事实。
- 不用空泛追问代替缺口分析。
- 不逐问逐答阻塞用户；优先一次性输出确认包。
- 不强制 small 任务进入完整确认包。
- 不新增 hook 自动触发。
- 不把“广泛搜索”理解成无边界研究；搜索范围必须服务于当前决策风险。

````

````text
Chunk ID: 0ab6d3

Original token count: 663
Output:
# DesignCritic

## Responsibility

在设计冻结前用批判视角审查方案，找出假设、遗漏、风险、设计缺陷、替代方案和需要用户确认的问题。

## Invocation conditions

- 用户要求“深度思考”“分析缺陷”“完善方案”或架构取舍。
- DeepThink 判断任务为 `large`，或高风险 `medium`。
- Planner 的计划存在关键未知、跨边界风险、验证空洞或多个可选方案。
- WorkflowIteration、Retrospective 或 Reviewer 发现设计阶段缺口。

## Required context

- 用户原始请求和验收目标。
- selected workflow、task size、当前 SDD artifact。
- 相关 SystemAgent workflow、capability、role、gate、policy。
- 当前 git boundary、事实源边界和已知禁止事项。
- 已提出的方案、默认假设、验证策略和开放问题。

## Output shape

```text
DesignCritic:
- Assumptions:
- Missing Context:
- Design Defects:
- Better Options:
- Trade-offs:
- User Decisions:
- Recommendation:
- Artifact Updates:
```

## Role Category

`function_category: review`

**Rubric（PASS/FAIL）**：
- **DC-R1 Assumption visibility**：必须列出设计依赖的关键假设；如果没有未知项，也要说明为什么可安全默认。
- **DC-R2 Alternative check**：必须至少检查一个更小、更安全或更易验证的替代方案；不能只重复 Planner 方案。
- **DC-R3 Artifact handoff**：如果任务使用 SDD，必须说明哪些结论应写入 `design/`、`progress.md`、`tasks.md`、`bdd.md` 或 `notes.md`。

## Boundary with Planner and Reviewer

| Role | Boundary |
| --- | --- |
| Planner | 拆任务、排序、识别依赖；DesignCritic 只批判设计质量和风险 |
| Reviewer | 对已形成的实现、计划或证据给出 gate verdict；DesignCritic 在冻结前暴露设计缺陷 |
| Retrospective | 任务完成前总结流程缺口；DesignCritic 不做完成态复盘 |
| Implementer | 按已批准计划修改文件；DesignCritic 不直接实现 |

## Forbidden behavior

- 不写实现代码。
- 不替代用户做最终方向选择。
- 不把建议伪装成事实；不确定必须标明。
- 不阻塞 small 任务。
- 不新增 hook 自动触发。
- 不输出不符合 `APPROVE / CONCERNS / REJECT` 词表的 gate verdict；如需 verdict，应交给 Reviewer。

## Shared constraints

- 默认中文输出；命令、代码、错误信息保留原文。
- 先读事实源，不凭记忆批判。
- 不覆盖用户已有改动。
- 不 push；commit 仅在用户或当前策略明确允许且 git status 范围干净时进行。
- 输出必须包含路径、证据和不确定性。

````

```json
{
  "type": "tool_search_output",

      "description": "Tools for spawning and managing sub-agents.",
      "tools": [
        {
          "type": "function",
          "name": "spawn_agent",
          "description": "\n        \n        Available model overrides (optional; inherited parent model is preferred):\n- `gpt-5.5`: Frontier model for complex coding, research, and real-world work. Reasoning efforts: low, medium (default), high, xhigh. Service tiers: priority.\n- `gpt-5.4`: Strong model for everyday coding. Reasoning efforts: low, medium (default), high, xhigh. Service tiers: priority.\n- `gpt-5.4-mini`: Small, fast, and cost-efficient model for simpler coding tasks. Reasoning efforts: low, medium (default), high, xhigh.\n- `gpt-5.3-codex`: Coding-optimized model. Reasoning efforts: low, medium (default), high, xhigh.\n- `gpt-5.2`: Optimized for professional work and long-running agents. Reasoning efforts: low, medium (default), high, xhigh.\n        Spawn a sub-agent for a well-scoped task. Returns the spawned agent id plus the user-facing nickname when available. Spawned agents inherit your current model by default. Omit `model` to use that preferred default; set `model` only when an explicit override is needed.\nThis spawn_agent tool provides you access to sub-agents that inherit your current model by default. Do not set the `model` field unless the user explicitly asks for a different model or there is a clear task-specific reason. You should follow the rules and guidelines below to use this tool.\n\nOnly use `spawn_agent` if and only if the user explicitly asks for sub-agents, delegation, or parallel agent work.\nRequests for depth, thoroughness, research, investigation, or detailed codebase analysis do not count as permission to spawn.\nAgent-role guidance below only helps choose which agent to use after spawning is already authorized; it never authorizes spawning by itself.\n\n### When to delegate vs. do the subtask yourself\n- First, quickly analyze the overall user task and form a succinct high-level plan. Identify which tasks are immediate blockers on the critical path, and which tasks are sidecar tasks that are needed but can run in parallel without blocking the next local step. As part of that plan, explicitly decide what immediate task you should do locally right now. Do this planning step before delegating to agents so you do not hand off the immediate blocking task to a submodel and then waste time waiting on it.\n- Use a subagent when a subtask is easy enough for it to handle and can run in parallel with your local work. Prefer delegating concrete, bounded sidecar tasks that materially advance the main task without blocking your immediate next local step.\n- Do not delegate urgent blocking work when your immediate next step depends on that result. If the very next action is blocked on that task, the main rollout should usually do it locally to keep the critical path moving.\n- Keep work local when the subtask is too difficult to delegate well and when it is tightly coupled, urgent, or likely to block your immediate next step.\n\n### Designing delegated subtasks\n- Subtasks must be concrete, well-defined, and self-contained.\n- Delegated subtasks must materially advance the main task.\n- Do not duplicate work between the main rollout and delegated subtasks.\n- Avoid issuing multiple delegate calls on the same unresolved thread unless the new delegated task is genuinely different and necessary.\n- Narrow the delegated ask to the concrete output you need next.\n- For coding tasks, prefer delegating concrete code-change worker subtasks over read-only explorer analysis when the subagent can make a bounded patch in a clear write scope.\n- When delegating coding work, instruct the submodel to edit files directly in its forked workspace and list the file paths it changed in the final answer.\n- For code-edit subtasks, decompose work so each delegated task has a disjoint write set.\n\n### After you delegate\n- Call wait_agent very sparingly. Only call wait_agent when you need the result immediately for the next critical-path step and you are blocked until it returns.\n- Do not redo delegated subagent tasks yourself; focus on integrating results or tackling non-overlapping work.\n- While the subagent is running in the background, do meaningful non-overlapping work immediately.\n- Do not repeatedly wait by reflex.\n- When a delegated coding task returns, quickly review the uploaded changes, then integrate or refine them.\n\n### Parallel delegation patterns\n- Run multiple independent information-seeking subtasks in parallel when you have distinct questions that can be answered independently.\n- Split implementation into disjoint codebase slices and spawn multiple agents for them in parallel when the write scopes do not overlap.\n- Delegate verification only when it can run in parallel with ongoing implementation and is likely to catch a concrete risk before final integration.\n- The key is to find opportunities to spawn multiple independent subtasks in parallel within the same round, while ensuring each subtask is well-defined, self-contained, and materially advances the main task.",
          "strict": false,
          "defer_loading": true,
          "parameters": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": {
              "agent_type": {
                "type": "string",
                "description": "Optional type name for the new agent. If omitted, `default` is used.\nAvailable roles:\nanalyst: {\nRequirements clarity, acceptance criteria, hidden constraints\n- This role's model is set to `gpt-5.5` and its reasoning effort is set to `medium`. These settings cannot be changed.\n}\narchitect: {\nSystem design, boundaries, interfaces, long-horizon tradeoffs\n- This role's model is set to `gpt-5.5` and its reasoning effort is set to `high`. These settings cannot be changed.\n}\ncode-reviewer: {\nComprehensive review across all concerns\n- This role's model is set to `gpt-5.5` and its reasoning effort is set to `high`. These settings cannot be changed.\n}\ncode-simplifier: {\nSimplifies recently modified code for clarity and consistency without changing behavior\n- This role's model is set to `gpt-5.5` and its reasoning effort is set to `high`. These settings cannot be changed.\n}\ncritic: {\nPlan/design critical challenge and review\n- This role's model is set to `gpt-5.5` and its reasoning effort is set to `high`. These settings cannot be changed.\n}\ndebugger: {\nRoot-cause analysis, regression isolation, failure diagnosis\n- This role's model is set to `gpt-5.5` and its reasoning effort is set to `high`. These settings cannot be changed.\n}\ndependency-expert: {\nExternal SDK/API/package evaluation\n- This role's model is set to `gpt-5.5` and its reasoning effort is set to `high`. These settings cannot be changed.\n}\ndesigner: {\nUX/UI architecture, interaction design\n- This role's model is set to `gpt-5.5` and its reasoning effort is set to `high`. These settings cannot be changed.\n}\nexecutor: {\nCode implementation, refactoring, feature work\n- This role's model is set to `gpt-5.5` and its reasoning effort is set to `medium`. These settings cannot be changed.\n}\nexplore: {\nFast codebase search and file/symbol mapping\n- This role's model is set to `gpt-5.3-codex-spark` and its reasoning effort is set to `low`. These settings cannot be changed.\n}\ngit-master: {\nCommit strategy, history hygiene, rebasing\n- This role's model is set to `gpt-5.5` and its reasoning effort is set to `high`. These settings cannot be changed.\n}\nplanner: {\nTask sequencing, execution plans, risk flags\n- This role's model is set to `gpt-5.5` and its reasoning effort is set to `medium`. These settings cannot be changed.\n}\nresearcher: {\nExternal documentation and reference research\n- This role's model is set to `gpt-5.5` and its reasoning effort is set to `high`. These settings cannot be changed.\n}\nteam-executor: {\nSupervised team execution for conservative delivery lanes\n- This role's model is set to `gpt-5.5` and its reasoning effort is set to `medium`. These settings cannot be changed.\n}\ntest-engineer: {\nTest strategy, coverage, flaky-test hardening\n- This role's model is set to `gpt-5.5` and its reasoning effort is set to `medium`. These settings cannot be changed.\n}\nverifier: {\nCompletion evidence, claim validation, test adequacy\n- This role's model is set to `gpt-5.5` and its reasoning effort is set to `high`. These settings cannot be changed.\n}\nvision: {\nImage/screenshot/diagram analysis\n- This role's model is set to `gpt-5.5` and its reasoning effort is set to `low`. These settings cannot be changed.\n}\nwriter: {\nDocumentation, migration notes, user guidance\n- This role's model is set to `gpt-5.5` and its reasoning effort is set to `high`. These settings cannot be changed.\n}\ndefault: {\nDefault agent.\n}\nexplorer: {\nUse `explorer` for specific codebase questions.\nExplorers are fast and authoritative.\nThey must be used to ask specific, well-scoped questions on the codebase.\nRules:\n- In order to avoid redundant work, you should avoid exploring the same problem that explorers have already covered. Typically, you should trust the explorer results without additional verification. You are still allowed to inspect the code yourself to gain the needed context!\n- You are encouraged to spawn up multiple explorers in parallel when you have multiple distinct questions to ask about the codebase that can be answered independently. This allows you to get more information faster without waiting for one question to finish before asking the next. While waiting for the explorer results, you can continue working on other local tasks that do not depend on those results. This parallelism is a key advantage of delegation, so use it whenever you have multiple questions to ask.\n- Reuse existing explorers for related questions.\n}\nworker: {\nUse for execution and production work.\nTypical tasks:\n- Implement part of a feature\n- Fix tests or bugs\n- Split large refactors into independent chunks\nRules:\n- Explicitly assign **ownership** of the task (files / responsibility). When the subtask involves code changes, you should clearly specify which files or modules the worker is responsible for. This helps avoid merge conflicts and ensures accountability. For example, you can say \"Worker 1 is responsible for updating the authentication module, while Worker 2 will handle the database layer.\" By defining clear ownership, you can delegate more effectively and reduce coordination overhead.\n- Always tell workers they are **not alone in the codebase**, and they should not revert the edits made by others, and they should adjust their implementation to accommodate the changes made by others. This is important because there may be multiple workers making changes in parallel, and they need to be aware of each other's work to avoid conflicts and ensure a cohesive final product.\n}"
```
